# 获取指定视频号ID

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: 获取指定视频号ID
      deprecated: false
      description: |+
        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        code = 0  |调用成功
        101      |keywords有误
        20001    |金额不足
        50000    |服务器内部错误


        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        | ['v2_info_list']['contact']['username'] | 1.视频号的唯一id v2_name |
        | ['v2_info_list']['contact']['nickname']  | 1.视频号昵称 |
        | ['v2_info_list']['contact']['signature']  |   1.视频号简介 |
        | ['v2_info_list']['contact']['ext_info']  | 1.视频号ip信息 |
        | ['video_object_list']['id']  | 2.视频唯一id  object_id  |
        | ['video_object_list']['nickname']  | 2.视频号昵称 |
        | ['video_object_list']['username']  | 2.视频号v2_name |
        | ['video_object_list']['object_nonce_id'] | 2.object_nonce_id |

        返回 指定的视频号信息

        cost            花费
        remain_money    余额

      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters:
        - name: key
          in: query
          description: 极致了key （0.2/次）
          required: true
          example: '{{key}}'
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: verifycode
          in: query
          description: 如果设置了需要填写
          required: false
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: type
          in: query
          description: type=6
          required: true
          example: '6'
          schema:
            type: string
            const: '6'
        - name: keywords
          in: query
          description: 需要搜索的视频号名称
          required: true
          example: 王者荣耀
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties: {}
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 视频号接口
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-226936157-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
